---
title: "Lectures"
description: Computational Neuroscience
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false 
    theme: cosmo
fontsize: 14pt
---

- Week 1
  - [Variable Assignment and Data Types in Python](lectures/week_1/lecture_1.html)
  - [Container Variable Types in Python and Accessing Elements](lectures/week_1/lecture_2.html)
  - [Creating and Calling Functions in Python](lectures/week_1/lecture_3.html)
  - [Type Coercion in Python](lectures/week_1/lecture_4.html)
  - [Loops and Conditional Flow in Python](lectures/week_1/lecture_5.html)
  - [Getting Help with Python Programming](lectures/week_1/lecture_6.html)
  - [Creating a Minimal Reproducible Example (MRE)](lectures/week_1/lecture_7.html)
